function.description: Returns the widgetVar of the closest parent widget of the given component.
Gets the value of the current column. This is only required when p:columns and field is used with a nested expression like user.name.
Gets the value of the current column converted to string. This is only required when p:columns and field is used with a nested expression like user.name.
Escapes a string for a JS var name (e.g. ':' in a clientId). This is useful if you need to use a clientId in the name of a p:remoteCommand.
Gets the current ISO 639-1 Language Code from current Locale so 'pt_BR' becomes 'pt'.
Returns the clientId of the resolved component for the given expression.
Returns the clientIds of the resolved components for the given expression.
Returns the resolved UIComponent for the given expression.
Returns the first UIComponent with the same id (not clientId!) as the requested id. This method ignores any algorithm or NamingContainers.
Returns the widgetVar of the resolved component for the given expression.
Returns true when facet and one of the first level children is rendered.

tag.description: AccordionPanel is a container component that displays content in stacked format.

attribute.description: Id of the active tab.
attribute.name: active

attribute.description: Index of the active tab.Default is 0.
attribute.name: activeIndex

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: When enabled, dynamically loaded tab contents are cached.Default is true.
attribute.name: cache

attribute.description: Defines text direction, valid values are ltr and rtl.Default is ltr.
attribute.name: dir

attribute.description: When enabled, only active tab contents are rendered.Default is false.
attribute.name: dynamic

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Whether to keep component state across views.Default is false.
attribute.name: multiViewState

attribute.description: Allows multiple tabs to be active at the same time.Default is false.
attribute.name: multiple

attribute.description: Client side callback to execute when a tab is changed.
attribute.name: onTabChange

attribute.description: Client side callback to execute when a tab is closed.
attribute.name: onTabClose

attribute.description: Client side callback to execute when a tab is shown.
attribute.name: onTabShow

attribute.description: Whether to prepend the component id to its children.Default is true.
attribute.name: prependId

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Scrolls the active tab into view. Valid values are start, center, end, nearest.
attribute.name: scrollIntoView

attribute.description: Inline style of the component.
attribute.name: style

attribute.description: Style class of the component.
attribute.name: styleClass

attribute.description: MethodExpression to control tab access.
attribute.name: tabController

attribute.description: Position of the element in the tabbing order.Default is 0.
attribute.name: tabindex

attribute.description: Speed of toggling in milliseconds.Default is 500.
attribute.name: toggleSpeed

attribute.description: Value binding expression to a data model.
attribute.name: value

attribute.description: Name of the request-scoped variable used to reference each data object in the iteration.
attribute.name: var

attribute.description: Name of the request-scoped variable used to expose the iteration status.
attribute.name: varStatus

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

tag.description: AjaxExceptionHandler is a utility component for the built-in ExceptionHandler.

attribute.description: Exception type to handle. If not specified, handles all exceptions.

attribute.description: Delay in milliseconds before showing the status.Default is 0.

attribute.description: Inline style of the component.

tag.description: Audio is a media component that embeds an audio player.

attribute.description: Specifies that the media will start playing as soon as it is ready.Default is false.
attribute.name: autoplay

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Whether to cache the media contentDefault is true.
attribute.name: cache

attribute.description: Specifies that media controls should be displayed (such as a play/pause button etc).Default is false.
attribute.name: controls

attribute.description: When specified, helps the browser select what controls to show. Values are nodownload, nofullscreen and noremoteplayback.
attribute.name: controlslist

attribute.description: Indicates whether to use CORS to fetch the related media file. Values are anonymous and user-credentials.
attribute.name: crossorigin

attribute.description: Sets or returns the current playback position in seconds.
attribute.name: currentTime

attribute.description: Specifies that the audio output should be muted by default.Default is false.
attribute.name: defaultMuted

attribute.description: Sets or returns the default speed of the media playback.
attribute.name: defaultPlaybackRate

attribute.description: Prevents the browser from suggesting a Picture-in-Picture context menu or to request Picture-in-Picture automatically.Default is false.
attribute.name: disablepictureinpicture

attribute.description: Used to disable the capability of remote playback in devices that are attached using wired and wireless technologies.Default is false.
attribute.name: disableremoteplayback

attribute.description: Height of the media component.
attribute.name: height

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Specifies that the media will start over again, every time it is finished.Default is false.
attribute.name: loop

attribute.description: Specifies that the audio output of the media should be muted.Default is false.
attribute.name: muted

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the media loading is aborted.
attribute.name: onabort

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the browser can start playing the media.
attribute.name: oncanplay

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the browser can play through the media without stopping for buffering.
attribute.name: oncanplaythrough

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the duration of the media is changed.
attribute.name: ondurationchange

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the media resource element suddenly becomes empty.
attribute.name: onemptied

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the media has reached the end.
attribute.name: onended

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when an error occurs while loading the media.
attribute.name: onerror

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when media data is loaded.
attribute.name: onloadeddata

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when meta data (like dimensions and duration) are loaded.
attribute.name: onloadedmetadata

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the browser starts looking for the media.
attribute.name: onloadstart

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the media is paused.
attribute.name: onpause

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the media is started or is no longer paused.
attribute.name: onplay

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the media is playing after having been paused or stopped for buffering.
attribute.name: onplaying

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the browser is downloading the media.
attribute.name: onprogress

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the playing speed of the media is changed.
attribute.name: onratechange

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the user is finished moving/skipping to a new position in the media.
attribute.name: onseeked

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the user starts moving/skipping to a new position in the media.
attribute.name: onseeking

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the browser is trying to get media data, but data is not available.
attribute.name: onstalled

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the browser is intentionally not getting media data.
attribute.name: onsuspend

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the playing position has changed.
attribute.name: ontimeupdate

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the volume has been changed.
attribute.name: onvolumechange

attribute.description: Client-side callback to execute when the media has paused but is expected to resume.
attribute.name: onwaiting

attribute.description: Sets or returns the speed of the media playback.
attribute.name: playbackRate

attribute.description: Media player type.
attribute.name: player

attribute.description: A Boolean attribute indicating that the video is to be played 'inline', that is within the element's playback area.Default is false.
attribute.name: playsinline

attribute.description: Specifies an image to be shown while the video is downloading, or until the user hits the play button.
attribute.name: poster

attribute.description: Specifies if and how the author thinks the media should be loaded when the page loads. Values are auto, metadata, and none.
attribute.name: preload

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Inline style of the component.
attribute.name: style

attribute.description: Style class of the component.
attribute.name: styleClass

attribute.description: Media source value.
attribute.name: value

attribute.description: Sets or returns the audio volume of the media. Must be a number between 0.0 and 1.0.
attribute.name: volume

attribute.description: Width of the media component.
attribute.name: width

tag.description: AutoComplete is a component that provides live suggestions while an input is being typed.

attribute.description: Access key to transfer focus to the input element.

attribute.description: When enabled, component is active.Default is true.
attribute.name: active

attribute.description: Alternate textual description of the input field.

attribute.description: Search expression to append the panel to.Default is @(body).

attribute.description: Identifies the element(s) that describe the object, enhancing accessibility.
attribute.name: ariaDescribedBy

attribute.description: Position of the panel relative to the target.Default is left bottom.
attribute.name: at

attribute.description: When enabled, automatically highlights first suggestion.Default is true.
attribute.name: autoHighlight

attribute.description: When enabled, automatically selects highlighted suggestion.Default is true.
attribute.name: autoSelection

attribute.description: Controls browser autocomplete behavior. Possible values are 'on', 'off', and 'new-password'.
attribute.name: autocomplete

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: When enabled, caches suggestions on client side.Default is false.
attribute.name: cache

attribute.description: Timeout in milliseconds for cached suggestions.Default is 300000.

attribute.description: Endpoint URL for REST-based autocomplete.

attribute.description: Direction indication for text that does not inherit directionality.Default is ltr.

attribute.description: Specifies that an element should be disabled.Default is false.
attribute.name: disabled

attribute.description: When enabled, shows dropdown button.Default is false.

attribute.description: Tabindex for the dropdown button.

attribute.description: When enabled, loads suggestions dynamically.Default is false.

attribute.description: Message to display when no suggestions are available.

attribute.description: When enabled, escapes HTML in suggestions.Default is true.

attribute.description: When enabled, forces selection from suggestions.Default is false.
attribute.name: forceSelection

attribute.description: Property to group suggestions by.

attribute.description: Tooltip text for group headers.
attribute.name: groupByTooltip

attribute.description: CSS selector for highlighting matched text.
attribute.name: highlightSelector

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: When set true, process validations logic is executed at apply request values phase for this component.Default is false.
attribute.name: immediate

attribute.description: Inline style for the input element.

attribute.description: CSS class for the input element.

attribute.description: Specifies the type of data expected in the input, aiding virtual keyboards.

attribute.description: Property to use for displaying items.

attribute.description: CSS class for each item.

attribute.description: Property to use for item value.

attribute.description: Position of the item tooltip relative to the target.

attribute.description: A localized user presentable name.

attribute.description: Specifies the language of the element's content.

attribute.description: LazyDataModel for lazy loading suggestions.

attribute.description: Text to display when there are more results.Default is ....

attribute.description: When enabled, allows multiple selections.Default is false.

attribute.description: Position of the panel relative to the input.Default is left top.

attribute.description: Fires when an element loses focus.

attribute.description: Fires when the value of an element has been changed.

attribute.description: Fires when a mouse click on the element.

attribute.description: Fires when a mouse double-click on the element.

attribute.description: Script to execute when the element's value is invalid.

tag.description: Column is an extended version of the standard column used by various PrimeFaces components like datatable, treetable and more.

attribute.name: ariaHeaderText

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Case sensitivity for sorting, insensitive by default.Default is false.
attribute.name: caseSensitiveSort

attribute.description: Defines the number of columns the column spans.Default is 1.

attribute.name: converter

attribute.description: Defines the display priority, in which order the columns should be displayed.Default is 0.
attribute.name: displayPriority

attribute.description: Defines if column is draggable if draggableColumns is set. Default true.Default is true.
attribute.name: draggable

attribute.description: Defines the number of columns the column spans to be exported.Default is 0.

attribute.description: Defines if the footer value of column to be exported.

attribute.name: exportHeaderValue

attribute.description: Defines the value of the cell to be exported if something other than the cell contents or exportFunction.
attribute.name: exportValue

attribute.description: Defines if the column should be exported by dataexporter.Default is true.
attribute.name: exportable

attribute.name: field

attribute.description: Property to be used for filtering.

attribute.description: Custom implementation to filter a value against a constraint.
attribute.name: filterFunction

attribute.description: Match mode for filtering.Default is startsWith.
attribute.name: filterMatchMode

attribute.description: Maximum number of characters for an input filter.Default is Integer.MAX_VALUE.
attribute.name: filterMaxLength

attribute.description: Placeholder for plain input text style filters.
attribute.name: filterPlaceholder

attribute.description: Location of the column filter with respect to header content. Options are 'bottom'(default) and 'top'.Default is bottom.

attribute.description: Inline style of the filter element.

attribute.name: headerText

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.name: nullSortOrder

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.name: resizable

attribute.description: Responsive priority of the column, lower values have more priority.Default is 0.

attribute.description: Defines the number of rows the column spans.Default is 1.

attribute.description: If less than delay milliseconds elapses between calls to request() only the most recent one is sent and all other requests are discarded. If this option is not specified, or if the value of delay is the literal string 'none' without the quotes, no delay is used.

attribute.description: When set to true this button is only enabled after successful client side validation. Used together with p:clientValidator on all relevant input-components.Default is false.
attribute.name: enabledByValidateClient

attribute.description: Defines if label of the component is escaped or not.Default is false.
attribute.name: escape

attribute.description: Form to serialize for an ajax request.Default is The enclosing form.
attribute.name: form

attribute.description: Global ajax requests are listened by ajaxStatus component, setting global to false will not trigger ajaxStatus.Default is true.
attribute.name: global

attribute.description: Icon of the button.
attribute.name: icon

attribute.description: Position of the icon.Default is left.
attribute.name: iconPos

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: If true, components which autoUpdate="true" will not be updated for this request. If not specified, or the value is false, no such indication is made.Default is false.
attribute.name: ignoreAutoUpdate

attribute.description: If true, unresolvable components (ComponentNotFoundException) referenced in the update/process attribute are ignored.Default is false.
attribute.name: ignoreComponentNotFound

attribute.description: When set true, process validations logic is executed at apply request values phase for this component.Default is false.
attribute.name: immediate

attribute.description: Displays button inline instead of fitting the content width, only used by mobile.Default is false.
attribute.name: inline

attribute.description: A localized user presentable name.
attribute.name: label

attribute.description: Fires when an element loses focus.
attribute.name: onblur

attribute.description: Fires when the value of an element has been changed.
attribute.name: onchange

attribute.description: Fires when a mouse click on the element.
attribute.name: onclick

attribute.description: Client-side javascript callback to execute when ajax request is completed.
attribute.name: oncomplete

attribute.description: Fires when a mouse double-click on the element.
attribute.name: ondblclick

attribute.description: Client-side javascript callback to execute when ajax request fails.
attribute.name: onerror

attribute.description: Fires when an element gets focus.
attribute.name: onfocus

attribute.description: Fires when a user is pressing a key.
attribute.name: onkeydown

attribute.description: Fires when a user presses a key.
attribute.name: onkeypress

attribute.description: Fires when a user releases a key.
attribute.name: onkeyup

attribute.description: Fires when a mouse button is pressed down on an element.
attribute.name: onmousedown

attribute.description: Fires when the mouse pointer is moving while it is over an element.
attribute.name: onmousemove

attribute.description: Fires when the mouse pointer moves out of an element.
attribute.name: onmouseout

attribute.description: Fires when the mouse pointer moves onto an element.
attribute.name: onmouseover

attribute.description: Fires when a mouse button is released over an element.
attribute.name: onmouseup

attribute.description: Client-side javascript callback to execute before ajax request begins.
attribute.name: onstart

attribute.description: Client-side javascript callback to execute when ajax request succeeds.
attribute.name: onsuccess

attribute.description: Enables serialization of values belonging to the partially processed components only.Default is false.
attribute.name: partialSubmit

attribute.description: Selector to use when partial submit is on, default is ":input" to select all descendant inputs of a partially processed components.
attribute.name: partialSubmitFilter

attribute.description: Component(s) to process in partial request.
attribute.name: process

attribute.description: Specifies that an input field is read-only.Default is false.
attribute.name: readonly

attribute.description: When enabled, click event can be added to disabled button.Default is false.
attribute.name: renderDisabledClick

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: If true, local values of input components to be updated within the ajax request would be reset.Default is false.
attribute.name: resetValues

attribute.description: Defines the size of the button, valid values are "small" and "large".
attribute.name: size

attribute.description: Specifies an inline CSS style for an element.
attribute.name: style

attribute.description: Specifies one or more CSS class names for an element.
attribute.name: styleClass

attribute.description: Specifies the tab order of an element.
attribute.name: tabindex

attribute.description: Timeout in milliseconds for ajax request, whereas 0 means no timeout.Default is 0.
attribute.name: timeout

attribute.description: Specifies extra information about an element (displayed as a tooltip).
attribute.name: title

attribute.description: Component(s) to update with ajax.
attribute.name: update

attribute.description: When set to true client side validation is enabled, global setting is required to be enabled as a prerequisite.Default is false.
attribute.name: validateClient

attribute.description: Value of the component.
attribute.name: value

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

tag.description: CommandLink extends standard Faces commandLink with extra PrimeFaces capabilities.

attribute.description: Access key to transfer focus to the input element.

attribute.description: A method expression or a string outcome to process when command is executed.
attribute.name: action

attribute.description: An action listener to process when command is executed.
attribute.name: actionListener

attribute.description: Specifies the submit mode, when set to true (default), submit would be made with Ajax.Default is true.
attribute.name: ajax

attribute.description: Default is The aria-label attribute is used to define a string that labels the current element for accessibility..
attribute.name: ariaLabel

attribute.description: When set to true, ajax requests are not queued.Default is false.
attribute.name: async

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: If less than delay milliseconds elapses between calls to request() only the most recent one is sent and all other requests are discarded. If this option is not specified, or if the value of delay is the literal string 'none' without the quotes, no delay is used.
attribute.name: delay

attribute.description: Direction indication for text that does not inherit directionality.
attribute.name: dir

attribute.description: If true, the button will be disabled during Ajax requests triggered by the button.Default is true.

attribute.description: Specifies that an element should be disabled.Default is false.

attribute.description: Form to serialize for an ajax request.Default is The enclosing form.

attribute.description: Global ajax requests are listened by ajaxStatus component, setting global to false will not trigger ajaxStatus.Default is true.

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.

attribute.description: If true, components which autoUpdate="true" will not be updated for this request. If not specified, or the value is false, no such indication is made.Default is false.

attribute.description: If true, unresolvable components (ComponentNotFoundException) referenced in the update/process attribute are ignored.Default is false.

attribute.description: When set true, process validations logic is executed at apply request values phase for this component.Default is false.

attribute.description: Enables serialization of values belonging to the partially processed components only.Default is false.
attribute.name: partialSubmit

attribute.description: Selector to use when partial submit is on, default is ":input" to select all descendant inputs of a partially processed components.
attribute.name: partialSubmitFilter

attribute.description: Component(s) to process in partial request.

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.

attribute.description: If true, local values of input components to be updated within the ajax request would be reset.Default is false.

attribute.description: Specifies an inline CSS style for an element.

tag.description: ConfirmDialog is a dialog component used to display confirmation messages.

attribute.description: Append dialog to the element with the given identifier.Default is @(body).
attribute.name: appendTo

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Makes dialog closable.Default is true.
attribute.name: closable

attribute.description: Closes dialog when escape key is pressed.Default is false.
attribute.name: closeOnEscape

attribute.description: Defines text direction, valid values are ltr and rtl.Default is ltr.
attribute.name: dir

attribute.description: Closes dialog by clicking on the modal background mask.Default is false.
attribute.name: dismissibleMask

attribute.description: When enabled, confirmDialog becomes a shared for other components that require confirmation.Default is false.
attribute.name: global

attribute.description: Header text.
attribute.name: header

attribute.description: Height of the dialog.
attribute.name: height

attribute.description: Hide effect to be used when hiding dialog.
attribute.name: hideEffect

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Message text to display.
attribute.name: message

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: In responsive mode, dialog adjusts itself based on screen width.Default is false.
attribute.name: responsive

attribute.description: Severity of the message, valid values are 'alert' and 'info'.Default is alert.
attribute.name: severity

attribute.description: Show effect to be used when displaying dialog.
attribute.name: showEffect

attribute.description: Inline style of the component.
attribute.name: style

attribute.description: Style class of the component.
attribute.name: styleClass

attribute.description: Renders dialog as visible.Default is false.
attribute.name: visible

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

attribute.description: Width of the dialog.
attribute.name: width

tag.description: ConfirmPopup is a popup component used to display confirmation messages.

attribute.description: Appends the popup to the given search expression.Default is @(body).
attribute.name: appendTo

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Allows the popup to be hidden when clicking outside of it.Default is true.
attribute.name: dismissable

attribute.description: When enabled, acts as a shared popup for multiple components that need confirmation.Default is false.
attribute.name: global

attribute.description: Icon to display next to the message.
attribute.name: icon

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Text to be displayed in body.
attribute.name: message

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Inline style of the component.
attribute.name: style

attribute.description: Style class of the component.
attribute.name: styleClass

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

tag.description: ContextMenu provides an overlay menu displayed on mouse right-click event.

attribute.description: Defines whether the first level of submenus will be displayed on mouseover or click event.Default is true.
attribute.name: autoDisplay

attribute.description: Client side callback to execute before showing.
attribute.name: beforeShow

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Defines text direction, valid values are ltr and rtl.Default is ltr.
attribute.name: dir

attribute.description: If true, prevents menu from being shownDefault is false.
attribute.name: disabled

attribute.description: Event to bind contextMenu display, default is contextmenu aka right click.
attribute.name: event

attribute.description: Id of the component to attach to
attribute.name: for

attribute.description: Delay in milliseconds before hiding the submenu, if 0 not hidden until document.click().Default is 0.
attribute.name: hideDelay

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Menu model instance to create menu programmatically.
attribute.name: model

attribute.description: Specific type of tree nodes to attach to.
attribute.name: nodeType

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Defines the selection behavior, e.g., "single" or "multiple".Default is multiple.
attribute.name: selectionMode

attribute.description: Delay in milliseconds before displaying the submenu. Default is 0 meaning immediate.Default is 0.
attribute.name: showDelay

attribute.description: Inline style of the component.
attribute.name: style

attribute.description: Style class of the component.
attribute.name: styleClass

attribute.description: Position of the element in the tabbing order.Default is 0.
attribute.name: tabindex

attribute.description: Selector to filter the elements to attach the menu.
attribute.name: targetFilter

attribute.description: Event to toggle the submenus, valid values are "hover" and "click".
attribute.name: toggleEvent

attribute.description: Enable touch if supported by device. NULL uses global default or primefaces.TOUCHABLE. Default: globally enabled.
attribute.name: touchable

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

tag.description: Dashboard provides a portal like layout with drag-drop based reorder capabilities.

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Disables the component.Default is false.
attribute.name: disabled

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Dashboard model instance representing the layout of the UI.
attribute.name: model

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Allow reordering of panels.Default is true.
attribute.name: reordering

attribute.description: In responsive mode, PrimeFlex can be used to dynamically size columns and responsiveness.Default is false.
attribute.name: responsive

attribute.description: Scope for dashboard drag and drop behaviour. Items can be dragged between multiple dashboards with the same scope.Default is dashboard.
attribute.name: scope

attribute.description: Inline style of the dashboard container.
attribute.name: style

attribute.description: Style class of the dashboard container.
attribute.name: styleClass

attribute.description: Name of collection iterator which will be the value of DashboardWidget.getValue().
attribute.name: var

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

tag.description: DataGrid displays a collection of data in grid layout. AJAX Pagination is a built-in feature and paginator UI is fully customizable via various options like paginatorTemplate, rowPerPageOptions, pageLinks and more.

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Number of columns of grid.Default is 3.
attribute.name: columns

attribute.description: Template of the currentPageReport UI.Default is ({currentPage} of {totalPages}).
attribute.name: currentPageReportTemplate

attribute.description: Text to display when there is no data to display.Default is i18n.
attribute.name: emptyMessage

attribute.description: Index of the first data to display.Default is 0.
attribute.name: first

attribute.description: Use modern FlexGrid CSS for this component.
attribute.name: flex

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Defines if lazy loading is enabled for the data component.Default is True, if the value-binding is instance of LazyDataModel..
attribute.name: lazy

attribute.description: Whether to keep component state across views.Default is false.
attribute.name: multiViewState

attribute.description: Maximum number of page links to display.Default is 10.
attribute.name: pageLinks

attribute.description: Enables pagination.Default is false.
attribute.name: paginator

attribute.description: Defines if paginator should be hidden if total data count is less than number of rows per page.Default is true.
attribute.name: paginatorAlwaysVisible

attribute.description: Position of the paginator.Default is bottom.
attribute.name: paginatorPosition

attribute.description: Template of the paginator.Default is {FirstPageLink} {PreviousPageLink} {PageLinks} {NextPageLink} {LastPageLink} {RowsPerPageDropdown}.
attribute.name: paginatorTemplate

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Name of iterator to refer each row index.
attribute.name: rowIndexVar

attribute.description: Keeps state of its children on a per-row basis.Default is false.
attribute.name: rowStatePreserved

attribute.description: Inline style of each row (grid-cell).
attribute.name: rowStyle

attribute.description: Style class of each row (grid-cell).
attribute.name: rowStyleClass

attribute.description: Title for each row.
attribute.name: rowTitle

attribute.description: Number of rows to display per page. Default value is 0 meaning to display all data available.Default is 0.
attribute.name: rows

attribute.description: Template of the rowsPerPage dropdown.
attribute.name: rowsPerPageTemplate

attribute.description: Inline style of the component.
attribute.name: style

attribute.description: Style class of the component.
attribute.name: styleClass

attribute.description: Enable touch if supported by device. NULL uses global default or primefaces.TOUCHABLE. Default: globally enabled.
attribute.name: touchable

attribute.description: Datasource of the component.
attribute.name: value

attribute.description: Name of the iterator variable that references each element in the data set.
attribute.name: var

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

tag.description: DataList presents a collection of data in list layout with several display types. AJAX Pagination is a built-in feature and paginator UI is fully customizable via various options like paginatorTemplate, rowsPerPageOptions, pageLinks and more.

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Template of the currentPageReport UI.Default is ({currentPage} of {totalPages}).
attribute.name: currentPageReportTemplate

attribute.description: Text to display when there is no data to display.Default is i18n.
attribute.name: emptyMessage

attribute.description: Index of the first data to display.Default is 0.
attribute.name: first

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Style class of an item in list. This option is useful to assign specific styles to certain items using an EL expression.
attribute.name: itemStyleClass

attribute.description: Specifies the list item type.
attribute.name: itemType

attribute.description: Defines if lazy loading is enabled for the data component.Default is True, if the value-binding is instance of LazyDataModel..
attribute.name: lazy

attribute.description: Whether to keep component state across views.Default is false.
attribute.name: multiViewState

attribute.description: Maximum number of page links to display.Default is 10.
attribute.name: pageLinks

attribute.description: Enables pagination.Default is false.
attribute.name: paginator

attribute.description: Defines if paginator should be hidden if total data count is less than number of rows per page.Default is true.
attribute.name: paginatorAlwaysVisible

attribute.description: Position of the paginator.Default is bottom.
attribute.name: paginatorPosition

attribute.description: Template of the paginator.Default is {FirstPageLink} {PreviousPageLink} {PageLinks} {NextPageLink} {LastPageLink} {RowsPerPageDropdown}.
attribute.name: paginatorTemplate

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Name of iterator to refer each row index.
attribute.name: rowIndexVar

attribute.description: Keeps state of its children on a per-row basis.Default is false.
attribute.name: rowStatePreserved

attribute.description: Number of rows to display per page. Default value is 0 meaning to display all data available.Default is 0.
attribute.name: rows

attribute.description: Template of the rowsPerPage dropdown.
attribute.name: rowsPerPageTemplate

attribute.description: Inline style of the component.
attribute.name: style

attribute.description: Style class of the component.
attribute.name: styleClass

attribute.description: Enable touch if supported by device. NULL uses global default or primefaces.TOUCHABLE. Default: globally enabled.
attribute.name: touchable

attribute.description: Type of the list, valid values are "unordered", "ordered" and "definition".Default is unordered.
attribute.name: type

attribute.description: Datasource of the component.
attribute.name: value

attribute.description: Name of the iterator variable that references each element in the data set.
attribute.name: var

attribute.description: Name of the exported request scoped variable for the status of the iteration.
attribute.name: varStatus

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

tag.description: DataScroller displays a collection of data featuring on demand loading using scroll.

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Percentage height of the buffer between the bottom of the page and the scroll position to initiate the load for the new chunk. Value is defined in integer and default is 10 meaning load would happen after 90% of the viewport is scrolled down.Default is 10.
attribute.name: buffer

attribute.description: Number of items to fetch.Default is 0.
attribute.name: chunkSize

attribute.description: Index of the first data to display.Default is 0.
attribute.name: first

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Defines if lazy loading is enabled for the data component.Default is True, if the value-binding is instance of LazyDataModel..
attribute.name: lazy

attribute.description: Defines the target to listen for scroll event, valid values are "document" and "inline".Default is document.
attribute.name: mode

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Name of iterator to refer each row index.
attribute.name: rowIndexVar

attribute.description: Keeps state of its children on a per-row basis.Default is false.
attribute.name: rowStatePreserved

attribute.description: Number of rows to display per page. Default value is 0 meaning to display all data available.Default is 0.
attribute.name: rows

attribute.description: Defines pixel height of the viewport in inline mode.
attribute.name: scrollHeight

attribute.description: If the scrollAtBottom is enabled, scroll position is at bottom and data loading starts from the bottom.Default is false.
attribute.name: startAtBottom

attribute.description: Inline style of the component.
attribute.name: style

attribute.description: Style class of the component.
attribute.name: styleClass

attribute.description: Datasource of the component.
attribute.name: value

attribute.description: Name of the iterator variable that references each element in the data set.
attribute.name: var

attribute.description: Loads data on demand as the scrollbar gets close to the bottom.Default is false.
attribute.name: virtualScroll

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

tag.description: DataTable is an enhanced version of the standard Datatable that provides built-in solutions to many commons use cases like paging, sorting, selection, lazy loading, filtering and more.

attribute.description: Defines whether columns are allowed to be unsorted.Default is false.
attribute.name: allowUnsorting

attribute.description: Label to read by screen readers on checkbox and radio selection.
attribute.name: ariaRowLabel

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Defines the cell edit behavior, valid values are "eager" and "lazy".Default is eager.
attribute.name: cellEditMode

attribute.description: Enables cell navigation with the keyboard for WCAG and screen reader compliance.Default is true.
attribute.name: cellNavigation

attribute.description: Separator text to use in output mode of editable cells with multiple components.
attribute.name: cellSeparator

attribute.description: Caches the next page asynchronously.Default is false.
attribute.name: clientCache

attribute.description: Template of the currentPageReport UI.Default is ({currentPage} of {totalPages}).
attribute.name: currentPageReportTemplate

attribute.description: Locale to be used in features such as sorting.Default is The view locale.
attribute.name: dataLocale

attribute.description: Defines text direction, valid values are ltr and rtl.Default is ltr.
attribute.name: dir

attribute.description: Decides whether to disable context menu or not if a table has no records.Default is false.
attribute.name: disableContextMenuIfEmpty

attribute.description: Decides whether datatable columns can be reordered using dragdrop.Default is false.
attribute.name: draggableColumns

attribute.description: When enabled, rows can be reordered using dragdrop.Default is false.
attribute.name: draggableRows

attribute.description: Method expression to execute after dragging row.
attribute.name: draggableRowsFunction

attribute.description: Defines a client side event to open cell on editable table.Default is click.
attribute.name: editInitEvent

attribute.description: Defines edit mode, valid values are "row" and "cell".Default is row.
attribute.name: editMode

attribute.description: Controls incell editing.Default is false.
attribute.name: editable

attribute.description: Defines if cell editors of row should be displayed as editable or not. False means display mode.Default is false.
attribute.name: editingRow

attribute.description: Text to display when there is no data to display.Default is i18n.
attribute.name: emptyMessage

attribute.description: Defines if headerText and footerText values on columns are escaped or not.Default is true.
attribute.name: escapeText

attribute.description: Defines if row should be rendered as expanded by default.Default is false.
attribute.name: expandedRow

attribute.description: If XML data exporter in use, this allows customization of the row tag in the XML.
attribute.name: exportRowTag

attribute.description: If XML data exporter in use, this allows customization of the document tag in the XML.
attribute.name: exportTag

attribute.description: Property to be used for filtering.
attribute.name: filterBy

attribute.description: Delay to wait in milliseconds before sending each filter query.Default is 300.
attribute.name: filterDelay

attribute.description: Client side event to invoke filtering. If "enter" it will only filter after ENTER key is pressed.Default is keyup.
attribute.name: filterEvent

attribute.description: Defines if filtering would be done using normalized values (accents will be removed from characters).Default is false.
attribute.name: filterNormalize

attribute.description: List to keep the filtered data if filtering is enabled.
attribute.name: filteredValue

attribute.description: Index of the first data to display.Default is 0.
attribute.name: first

attribute.description: Number of columns to freezeDefault is 0.
attribute.name: frozenColumns

attribute.description: Defines the alignment of frozen columns, valid values are 'left' and 'right'.Default is left.
attribute.name: frozenColumnsAlignment

attribute.description: Number of rows to freeze starting from the beginning.Default is 0.
attribute.name: frozenRows

attribute.description: Value of the global filter to use when filtering by default.
attribute.name: globalFilter

attribute.description: Custom implementation to globally filter a value against a constraint.
attribute.name: globalFilterFunction

attribute.description: When true this will hide all column filters and allow all columns to be filtered by global filter only.Default is false.
attribute.name: globalFilterOnly

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Defines if lazy loading is enabled for the data component.Default is True, if the value-binding is instance of LazyDataModel..
attribute.name: lazy

attribute.name: liveResize

attribute.description: Enables live scrolling.Default is false.
attribute.name: liveScroll

attribute.name: multiViewState

attribute.description: Enables pagination.Default is false.

attribute.description: Style class for each row.
attribute.name: rowStyleClass

attribute.name: rowTitle

attribute.description: Number of rows to display per page. Default value is 0 meaning to display all data available.Default is 0.
attribute.name: rows

attribute.description: Template of the rowsPerPage dropdown.
attribute.name: rowsPerPageTemplate

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Specifies the orientation, valid values are "horizontal" and "vertical".Default is horizontal.
attribute.name: layout

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Inline style of the component.
attribute.name: style

attribute.description: Style class of the component.
attribute.name: styleClass

attribute.description: Advisory tooltip information.
attribute.name: title

attribute.description: Border style type, "solid", "dashed" and "dotted".Default is solid.
attribute.name: type

tag.description: Dock component mimics the well known dock interface of Mac OS X.

attribute.description: Whether to animate the OSX bounce effect when clicking an item.Default is true.
attribute.name: animate

attribute.description: How long in milliseconds to animate the bounce effect.Default is 1600.
attribute.name: animationDuration

attribute.description: Defines whether the first level of submenus will be displayed on mouseover or click event.Default is true.
attribute.name: autoDisplay

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Whether to block scrolling of the document.Default is false.
attribute.name: blockScroll

attribute.description: Defines text direction, valid values are ltr and rtl.Default is ltr.
attribute.name: dir

attribute.description: Horizontal alignment. left, center, or rightDefault is center.
attribute.name: halign

attribute.description: Delay in milliseconds before hiding the submenu, if 0 not hidden until document.click().Default is 0.
attribute.name: hideDelay

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: MenuModel instance to create menus programmatically
attribute.name: model

attribute.description: Position of the dock, bottom or top.Default is bottom.
attribute.name: position

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Delay in milliseconds before displaying the submenu. Default is 0 meaning immediate.Default is 0.
attribute.name: showDelay

attribute.description: Position of the element in the tabbing order.Default is 0.
attribute.name: tabindex

attribute.description: Event to toggle the submenus, valid values are "hover" and "click".
attribute.name: toggleEvent

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

tag.description: Draggable is a component that makes its child elements draggable.

attribute.description: Which element the draggable helper should be appended to while dragging. Can be a selector, element, jQuery object, or 'parent'.Default is parent.
attribute.name: appendTo

attribute.description: Constrains dragging to either the horizontal (x) or vertical (y) axis. Possible values: 'x', 'y'.
attribute.name: axis

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Prevents dragging from starting on specified elements.Default is input,textarea,button,select,option.
attribute.name: cancel

attribute.description: Constrains dragging to within the bounds of the specified element or region. Can be a selector, element, string ('parent', 'document', 'window'), or array [x1, y1, x2, y2].
attribute.name: containment

attribute.description: CSS cursor to display when dragging.Default is crosshair.
attribute.name: cursor

attribute.description: Id of the dashboard component to connect with.
attribute.name: dashboard

attribute.description: Disables the component.Default is false.
attribute.name: disabled

attribute.description: When enabled, the element can only be dragged, not dropped.Default is false.
attribute.name: dragOnly

attribute.description: Id of the component to make draggable.
attribute.name: for

attribute.description: Snaps the dragging helper to a grid, specified as [x,y] in pixels.
attribute.name: grid

attribute.description: Restricts dragging start from specified elements. Dragging can only start if the mousedown occurs on the specified element(s).
attribute.name: handle

attribute.description: Allows for a helper element to be used for dragging display. Possible values: 'original', 'clone', or a function that returns a DOM element.Default is original.
attribute.name: helper

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Client side callback to execute during dragging, immediately before the current move happens. Function receives (event, ui) where ui.helper, ui.position, and ui.offset are available. The values in ui.position may be changed to modify where the element will be positioned.
attribute.name: onDrag

attribute.description: Client side callback to execute when dragging starts.
attribute.name: onStart

attribute.description: Client side callback to execute when dragging stops.
attribute.name: onStop

attribute.description: Opacity for the helper while being dragged.Default is 1.0.
attribute.name: opacity

attribute.description: When enabled, a proxy element is used for dragging instead of the element itself.Default is false.
attribute.name: proxy

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: If set to true, the element will be returned to its start position when dragging stops.Default is false.
attribute.name: revert

attribute.description: Used to group sets of draggable and droppable components.Default is default.
attribute.name: scope

attribute.description: When enabled, the draggable will snap to the edges of the nearest elements.Default is false.
attribute.name: snap

attribute.description: Defines how snap elements are detected. Possible values: 'inner', 'outer', 'both'.Default is both.
attribute.name: snapMode

attribute.description: Distance in pixels from the snap element edges at which snapping should occur.Default is 20.
attribute.name: snapTolerance

attribute.description: Controls the z-index of the group of elements for which the stack option is set.
attribute.name: stack

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

attribute.description: Controls the z-index of the helper element during dragging.Default is -1.
attribute.name: zindex

tag.description: Droppable is a component that makes its child elements accept draggable elements.

attribute.description: Controls which draggable elements are accepted by the droppable. Can be a selector string or a function that returns true if the draggable should be accepted.Default is *.
attribute.name: accept

attribute.description: Style class to apply when an acceptable draggable is being dragged.
attribute.name: activeStyleClass

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Id of the datasource component to bind drag data.
attribute.name: datasource

attribute.description: Disables the droppable if set to true.Default is false.
attribute.name: disabled

attribute.description: Id of the component to make droppable.
attribute.name: for

attribute.description: By default, when an element is dropped on nested droppables, each droppable will receive the element. Setting this to true prevents parent droppables from receiving the element.Default is false.
attribute.name: greedy

attribute.description: Style class to apply when an acceptable draggable is being hovered over the droppable.
attribute.name: hoverStyleClass

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Client side callback to execute when an accepted draggable is dropped on the droppable. Function receives (event, ui) where ui.draggable, ui.helper, ui.position, and ui.offset are available.
attribute.name: onDrop

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Used to group sets of draggable and droppable items, in addition to the accept option. A draggable with the same scope value as a droppable will be accepted.Default is default.
attribute.name: scope

attribute.description: Specifies which mode to use for testing whether a draggable is hovering over a droppable. Possible values: 'fit', 'intersect', 'pointer', 'touch'.Default is intersect.
attribute.name: tolerance

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

tag.description: GraphicImage extends the h:graphicImage component with the ability of displaying binary data like an inputstream. Main use cases of GraphicImage is to make displaying images stored in database or on-the-fly images easier. Legacy way to do this is to come up with a Servlet that does the streaming, GraphicImage does all the hard work without the need of a Servlet.

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify whether the row group will be rendered expanded or closed.Default is true.
attribute.name: expanded

attribute.description: Name of the field associated to bean "var".
attribute.name: field

attribute.description: Property to be used for grouping.
attribute.name: groupBy

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Defines the number of rows the column spans.
attribute.name: rowspan

attribute.description: Custom pluggable sortFunction.
attribute.name: sortFunction

attribute.description: Sets default sorting order. Possible values "asc", "desc" or null.Default is asc.
attribute.name: sortOrder

attribute.description: Inline style of the component.
attribute.name: style

attribute.description: Style class of the component.
attribute.name: styleClass

tag.description: HotKey is a generic key binding component that can bind any formation of keys to javascript event handlers or ajax calls

attribute.description: A method expression or a string outcome to process when command is executed.
attribute.name: action

attribute.description: An action listener to process when command is executed.
attribute.name: actionListener

attribute.description: When set to true, ajax requests are not queued.Default is false.
attribute.name: async

attribute.description: The key binding.
attribute.name: bind

attribute.description: An alternative key binding for macOS.
attribute.name: bindMac

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: If less than delay milliseconds elapses between calls to request() only the most recent one is sent and all other requests are discarded. If this option is not specified, or if the value of delay is the literal string 'none' without the quotes, no delay is used.
attribute.name: delay

attribute.description: Disables the hotKey binding.Default is false.
attribute.name: disabled

attribute.description: Form to serialize for an ajax request.Default is The enclosing form.
attribute.name: form

attribute.description: Global ajax requests are listened by ajaxStatus component, setting global to false will not trigger ajaxStatus.Default is true.
attribute.name: global

attribute.description: Javascript event handler to be executed when the key binding is pressed.
attribute.name: handler

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: If true, components which autoUpdate="true" will not be updated for this request. If not specified, or the value is false, no such indication is made.Default is false.
attribute.name: ignoreAutoUpdate

attribute.description: If true, unresolvable components (ComponentNotFoundException) referenced in the update/process attribute are ignored.Default is false.
attribute.name: ignoreComponentNotFound

attribute.description: When set true, process validations logic is executed at apply request values phase for this component.Default is false.
attribute.name: immediate

attribute.description: Client-side javascript callback to execute when ajax request is completed.
attribute.name: oncomplete

attribute.description: Client-side javascript callback to execute when ajax request fails.
attribute.name: onerror

attribute.description: Client-side javascript callback to execute before ajax request begins.
attribute.name: onstart

attribute.description: Client-side javascript callback to execute when ajax request succeeds.
attribute.name: onsuccess

attribute.description: Enables serialization of values belonging to the partially processed components only.Default is false.
attribute.name: partialSubmit

attribute.description: Selector to use when partial submit is on, default is ":input" to select all descendant inputs of a partially processed components.
attribute.name: partialSubmitFilter

attribute.description: Component(s) to process in partial request.
attribute.name: process

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: If true, local values of input components to be updated within the ajax request would be reset.Default is false.
attribute.name: resetValues

attribute.description: Timeout in milliseconds for ajax request, whereas 0 means no timeout.Default is 0.
attribute.name: timeout

attribute.description: Component(s) to update with ajax.
attribute.name: update

attribute.description: Value of the component.
attribute.name: value

tag.description: IdleMonitor watches user actions on a page and notify callbacks in case they go idle or active again.

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: When true, the lastAccessed state is shared across all browser windows within the same servlet context.Default is false.
attribute.name: multiWindowSupport

attribute.description: Client side callback to execute when the user comes back.
attribute.name: onactive

attribute.description: Client side callback to execute when the user goes idle.
attribute.name: onidle

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Time to wait in milliseconds until deciding if the user is idle.Default is 300000.
attribute.name: timeout

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

tag.description: ImageCompare provides a user interface to compare two images.

tag.description: ImageCropper allows cropping a certain region of an image. A new image is created containing the cropped area and assigned to a CroppedImage instanced on the server side.

attribute.description: Alternate text of the image.
attribute.name: alt

attribute.description: Aspect ratio of the cropper area.Default is 0.0.
attribute.name: aspectRatio

attribute.description: An EL expression referring to a server side UIComponent instance in a backing bean.Default is generated.
attribute.name: binding

attribute.description: Maximum box height of the cropping area.Default is 0.
attribute.name: boxHeight

attribute.description: Maximum box width of the cropping area.Default is 0.
attribute.name: boxWidth

attribute.description: Controls browser caching mode of the resource.Default is true.
attribute.name: cache

attribute.description: EL expression resolves to a converter instance or literal converter ID defining a component converter.
attribute.name: converter

attribute.description: Show the dashed lines in the crop box.Default is true.
attribute.name: guides

attribute.description: Unique identifier of the component in a namingContainer.Default is generated.
attribute.name: id

attribute.description: Binary data to stream or context relative path.
attribute.name: image

attribute.description: When set true, process validations logic is executed at apply request values phase for this component.Default is false.
attribute.name: immediate

attribute.description: Initial coordinates of the cropper area (x, y, width,height).
attribute.name: initialCoords

attribute.description: Maximum size of the cropper area (width,height).
attribute.name: maxSize

attribute.description: Minimum size of the cropper area (width,height).
attribute.name: minSize

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.
attribute.name: rendered

attribute.description: Marks component as required.Default is false.
attribute.name: required

attribute.description: Re-render the cropper when resizing the window.Default is true.
attribute.name: responsive

attribute.description: Maximum number of bytes the image.Default is 10485760L.
attribute.name: sizeLimit

attribute.description: A method expression referring to a method validating the input.
attribute.name: validator

attribute.description: Value of the component.
attribute.name: value

attribute.description: A method binding expression referring to a method for handling a valuchangeevent.
attribute.name: valueChangeListener

attribute.description: Define the view mode of the cropper. ViewMode to 0, the crop box can extend outside the canvas, while a value of 1, 2 or 3 will restrict the crop box to the size of the canvas. ViewMode of 2 or 3 will additionally restrict the canvas to the container. Note that if the proportions of the canvas and the container are the same, there is no difference between 2 and 3.Default is 1.
attribute.name: viewMode

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
attribute.name: widgetVar

attribute.description: Enable to zoom the image by dragging touch.Default is true.
attribute.name: zoomOnTouch

attribute.description: Enable to zoom the image by wheeling mouse.Default is true.
attribute.name: zoomOnWheel

attribute.description: Boolean value to specify the rendering of the component, when set to false component will not be rendered.Default is true.

attribute.description: Style class of the component.
attribute.name: styleClass

attribute.description: Name of the client side widget.Default is generated ('widget_' + componentClientId).
